actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == enabled ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && bluetoothctl power on || bluetoothctl power off'
actions.update-command: bluetoothctl show | grep -q Powered: && echo true || echo false

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && hyprctl dispatch exec hyprsunset --temperature 6000 || pkill -INT hyprsunset'
actions.update-command: pgrep -x hyprsunset >/dev/null && echo true || echo false
